title: SpaceX surge is creating a unique hedging opportunity
summary: Tuesday's launch of SpaceX options set new records for a first-day, post-IPO options volume.

title: 'Passive' investors who dodged bitcoin are now forced to own SpaceX, which is three times more volatile
summary: Many advisors and money-managers invested in index funds who will soon be owners of Elon Musk's astronomic ambitions
